description_long: This shotgun features a modern tactical design with a matte black finish and a robust, angular frame. It is equipped with a prominent optical sight mounted on the top rail, enhancing its targeting capabilities for urban environments. The stock is adjustable and reinforced, with a cheek rest and a skeletal support structure for improved ergonomics and reduced weight. The fore-end is streamlined, with a visible barrel shroud and a short, vented barrel, suggesting a compact form factor suitable for close-quarters use. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for gloved hands, and the pistol grip is textured for secure handling. Overall, the shotgun's construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, optimized for durability and tactical performance.
description: A modern, tactical black shotgun with an optical sight, adjustable stock, and compact, vented barrel, designed for urban close-quarters use. Features a robust frame, large trigger guard, and ergonomic pistol grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, optical sight, and the compact, vented barrel profile.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the optical sight, adjustable stock, pistol grip, and overall tactical design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock's cheek rest, the back of the optical sight, and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the skeletal stock, pistol grip, and the mounting of the optical sight.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a short, vented shroud
attribute_stock_type: adjustable full stock with cheek rest and skeletal support
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with smooth contours and ample space
